# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing!

## Getting Started

1. Fork the repository
2. Clone your fork: `git clone https://github.com/your-username/your-repo.git`
3. Install dependencies: `pnpm install`
4. Start the dev server: `pnpm dev`

## Development Workflow

- Create a branch for your changes: `git checkout -b feat/your-feature`
- Make your changes
- Run `pnpm lint` and `pnpm build` to verify
- Submit a pull request

## Code Style

- TypeScript strict mode is enabled
- Run `pnpm format` to auto-format with Prettier
- ESLint rules are enforced via `pnpm lint`

## Pull Requests

- Use the provided PR template
- Keep changes focused and atomic
- Add a clear description of what changed and why
